We are forced to expect a continu-
ance of their tactics in an endeavor
to defeat the commission plan. One
of the ruses of the opposition will


be to agree upon and support Is


freeholders Of their choice opposed


to commission plan, and then per-


suade sufficiently large number of


good men favorable to our plan to


announce themselves as candidates,


in order to defeat, by dividing and
splitting up the friends Of the COM


mission plan and to elect their men
upon whom they will concentrate
their forces. BY organized and dill
gent efforts We have so far defeated
them at every step, but the fruits of


our efforts will be lost unless we
continue our work. In order to do
| this effecually and to devise the
| ways and means, the citizens COM


mite in charge of this campaign up
to the present stage has arranged
| for a meeting of the friends Of the
| commission plan to be held at the


Elks' hall on next Friday evening at
| s o'clock. The time is very short


and it is all important that as many


as possible of the friends of the
commission plan attend.
